name: Sprack Integration
description: Provides a shared mount for sprack hook events and container metadata, enabling host-side tmux status bar integration with container Claude Code sessions.

enableMetadataWriter.description: Install prompt hook that writes workdir and git state to /mnt/sprack/metadata/state.json

data.description: Shared directory for sprack hook events and container metadata. The hook bridge writes per-session JSONL event files here.
